title: mentha × alandica
intro: Mentha × alandica, also known as Finnish mint, is a rare hybrid species of mint native to Finland. It possesses medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as alleviating digestive issues and reducing respiratory problems. Finnish mint is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being. The plant's leaves can be used fresh or dried, and it is also used in traditional Finnish medicine to aid in the relief of various health concerns.
